action.reasoning: Observation: Best avg_acc still 0.4653 (iter2, replay=200/task+Adam). Recent runs with SGD+decay+unbalanced memory got 0.32 (val 0.324, early tasks ~0.25, late 0.75). Curves show insufficient logging. Analysis: LR decay too aggressive for pretrained RN18, unbalanced random selection hurts early tasks, Adam better for this setup. Decision: Rewrite clean train.py with Adam(lr=0.001, wd=1e-5, no decay), epochs=15/task, class-balanced memory (200/task ~20/class using meta classes_per_task for exact balance), more frequent logging (every 20 steps), stronger augs. This should improve avg_acc >0.5 by reducing forgetting. Keep model.py/predict.py. Train then submit_eval to measure.
